_fileRole: Human-readable ADAM_10 investor demo baseline. Not consumed by runtime code and not a machine-verifiable expected-output fixture.
_snapshotNote: Scan metrics were manually recorded from an ADAM_10 parse run on 2026-05-25 and may become stale if the IFC or parser changes.

demoScenario.goal: Run a fast investor walkthrough of upload → parse → detect → suggest risers → manual override → export readiness.
demoScenario.explanation: Use a representative subset of floors for predictable live performance and clear narration.
demoScenario._walkthroughNote_manualOverride: Demo shows one manual riser adjustment.

riserOrShaftCandidates.notes: Use current ADAM_10 BIMPipe baseline stack labels as demo identifiers.
riserOrShaftCandidates._note: Illustrative labels only — not asserted by automated tests.

priorityOrder: Kitchen/service sink fixtures on included demo floors
validationChecks: Included-floor toilets are visibly assigned to a stack candidate before export.
Kitchen/service sinks are reviewed as secondary targets.
Any unassigned targets are called out during the demo as known limitations.

routingPreparation.manualOverrideRule: Manual riser position changes take precedence over auto-suggested positions.

readyWhen: ADAM_10.ifc is uploaded while demo mode is enabled.
At least one riser candidate is visible in scoped floors.
Primary toilet targets were reviewed for stack assignment.
blockedWhen: Uploaded model is not ADAM_10.ifc while demo mode is enabled.
No risers are present after suggest/manual steps.
exportReadiness.note: This file documents demo expectations only and does not by itself prove end-to-end IFC export validation.
exportReadiness._note: For the investor walkthrough, use ADAM_10 only. This is presenter guidance, not an enforced runtime upload gate.

steps: Upload ADAM_10.ifc and confirm demo-mode gate accepts only this file.
Show parse success and explain scoped floors for the live run.
Run detection and highlight toilets/kitchens as routing targets.
Suggest risers, then manually adjust one riser to show override precedence.
State export readiness as ready or blocked based on the run result.
